description: Firm Book - consolidated cross-desk position blotter. Sizes each desk's positions to its allocator capital weight, nets tickers across desks, rolls up firm gross/net exposure, sector tilts, conviction overlap and desk conflicts.

eventbridge_scheduler.description: Firm Book consolidated blotter - daily 01:00 UTC via Amazon EventBridge Scheduler, 30 minutes after the Desk Allocator publishes its capital weights so the book is built on fresh desk sizing.
